ws.handshake_timeout: Authentication message was not received in time; connection closed.
ws.handshake_read_failed: Failed to read the authentication handshake.
ws.handshake_invalid_json: Authentication handshake is not valid JSON.
ws.handshake_invalid_shape: Authentication handshake has an invalid shape.
ws.handshake_wrong_type: Authentication handshake has the wrong type; expected type=auth.
ws.missing_token: Authentication handshake is missing the token field.
ws.forbidden_role: Insufficient permission; only doctors and administrators are allowed.
ws.session_wrong_status: Session is in an invalid state for a WebSocket connection.
ws.internal_error: Internal server error; the connection will be closed.
ws.audio_too_long: Recording too long (max {{maxSeconds}} seconds); automatically ended.
ws.invalid_audio_format: Unrecognized audio format; the segment has been discarded.
ws.rate_limit_exceeded: AI calls are too frequent; please retry in {{retryAfter}} seconds.
ws.ai_service_unavailable: Failed to generate AI response; please retry.

session.resumed: Existing conversation history has been resumed.
session.resume_failed: Unable to resume the existing conversation ({{reason}}).
session.idle_timeout: Idle timeout ({{minutes}} minutes of inactivity); the session has ended automatically.
session.ended_by_user: The session has been ended by the patient or assistant.
session.aborted_red_flag: A critical red-flag symptom was detected; the session has been aborted. Please seek medical attention immediately.
session.aborted_red_flag_dashboard: Critical red-flag symptom detected; session aborted.
